glosses.ja: 振りかざす; 振り回す

sentences.target: Ils brandissent des pancartes devant la mairie.
sentences.reading: /il bʁɑ̃dis de pɑ̃kaʁt dəvɑ̃ la meʁi/

translations.fr: Ils brandissent des pancartes devant la mairie.
translations.ipa: /il bʁɑ̃dis de pɑ̃kaʁt dəvɑ̃ la meʁi/
translations.en: They wave signs in front of city hall.
translations.de: Sie schwenken Schilder vor dem Rathaus.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在市政厅前挥舞标语牌。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺市政大樓前揮動標語牌。
translations.pt: Eles agitam cartazes em frente à prefeitura.
translations.he: הם מניפים שלטים מול בית העירייה.
translations.vi: Họ phất các tấm biển trước tòa thị chính.
translations.ar: إنهم يلوحون بلافتات أمام مبنى البلدية.
translations.nl: Ze zwaaien met borden voor het stadhuis.
translations.hi: वे नगर भवन के सामने तख्तियाँ लहरा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Κουνάνε πινακίδες μπροστά από το δημαρχείο.
translations.nb: De vifter med skilt foran rådhuset.
translations.id: Mereka mengayunkan papan tanda di depan balai kota.
translations.sv: De viftar med skyltar utanför stadshuset.
translations.ro: Ei flutură pancarte în fața primăriei.
translations.da: De vifter med skilte foran rådhuset.
translations.ja: 彼らは市役所の前で看板を振っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; serves as the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with ‘Ils’ and takes a direct object.
Indefinite plural article; determiner introducing the nonspecific plural noun ‘pancartes’.
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the NP, direct object of ‘brandissent’.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase ‘devant la mairie’.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for ‘mairie’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘devant’.

sentences.target: Je brandis ma carte au vigile.

translations.fr: Je brandis ma carte au vigile.
translations.en: I wave my card at the security guard.
translations.es: Le enseño mi tarjeta al vigilante.
translations.de: Ich zeige dem Sicherheitsmann meine Karte.
translations.it: Mostro la mia tessera al vigilante.
translations.ko: 나는 경비원에게 내 카드를 보여 준다.
translations.pt: Eu mostro meu cartão ao segurança.
translations.he: אני מראה את הכרטיס שלי לשומר.
translations.vi: Tôi đưa thẻ của mình cho bảo vệ.
translations.nl: Ik laat mijn pas aan de beveiliger zien.
translations.hu: Megmutatom a kártyámat a biztonsági őrnek.
translations.hi: मैं सुरक्षा गार्ड को अपना कार्ड दिखाता हूँ.
translations.el: Δείχνω την κάρτα μου στον φύλακα.
translations.nb: Jeg viser kortet mitt til vekteren.
translations.id: Saya menunjukkan kartu saya kepada satpam.
translations.sv: Jag visar mitt kort för väktaren.
translations.ro: Îi arăt cardul meu agentului de pază.
translations.da: Jeg viser mit kort til vagten.
translations.ja: 私は警備員に自分のカードを見せる。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; serves as the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; agrees with ‘Je’ and is transitive.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘carte’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘brandis’.
Contracted form of the preposition ‘à’ + definite article ‘le’; introduces the indirect object phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’.

translations.de: Hör auf, mit deinem Handy zu wedeln.
translations.nl: Stop met zwaaien met je telefoon.
translations.el: Σταμάτα να κουνάς το κινητό σου.
translations.nb: Slutt å vifte med telefonen din.
translations.da: Stop med at vifte med din telefon.
translations.ja: スマホを振り回すのをやめて。

tokens.explanation: Imperative form, 2nd person singular; used as a command.
Preposition required by the construction ‘arrêter de + infinitif’; introduces the infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘de’ specifying the action to stop doing.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘téléphone’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive ‘brandir’.

sentences.target: Elle brandit son parapluie vers la voiture.
sentences.reading: /ɛl bʁɑ̃di sɔ̃ paʁaplɥi vɛʁ la vwa.tyʁ/

translations.fr: Elle brandit son parapluie vers la voiture.
translations.ipa: /ɛl bʁɑ̃di sɔ̃ paʁaplɥi vɛʁ la vwa.tyʁ/
translations.en: She waves her umbrella toward the car.
translations.es: Ella agita su paraguas hacia el coche.
translations.de: Sie schwenkt ihren Regenschirm in Richtung des Autos.
translations.it: Lei sventola il suo ombrello verso l'auto.
translations.ru: Она размахивает зонтом в сторону машины.
translations.pt: Ela balança o guarda-chuva em direção ao carro.
translations.he: היא מניפה את המטרייה שלה לכיוון המכונית.
translations.vi: Cô ấy vẫy chiếc ô về phía chiếc xe.
translations.nl: Ze zwaait met haar paraplu naar de auto.
translations.uk: Вона розмахує парасолькою в бік автомобіля.
translations.hu: A kocsi felé lengeti az esernyőjét.
translations.hi: वह कार की ओर अपनी छतरी लहराती है.
translations.pl: Ona macha parasolką w stronę samochodu.
translations.el: Κουνάει την ομπρέλα της προς το αυτοκίνητο.
translations.nb: Hun vifter med paraplyen mot bilen.
translations.id: Dia mengayunkan payung ke arah mobil.
translations.sv: Hon viftar med paraplyet mot bilen.
translations.da: Hun vifter med paraplyen mod bilen.
translations.ja: 彼女は車に向けて傘を振る。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with ‘Elle’; transitive.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular (agreeing with ‘parapluie’); modifies the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘brandit’.
Preposition marking direction; heads the prepositional phrase ‘vers la voiture’.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘voiture’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘vers’.

Elle brandit son parapluie vers la voiture.

I wave my card at the security guard.
